content.rendered:
About Devonshire

Devonshire is a minimal React + Vite frontend designed for prototyping UX patterns and integrating with headless WordPress.

It provides a showcase system where developers and designers can build, preview, and iterate on UI components in isolation. When you're ready, connect it to a live WordPress instance to pull real content.

Goals

  • Keep the stack minimal — no heavy frameworks or CSS libraries
  • Support rapid prototyping with mock data
  • Demonstrate clean integration with the WordPress REST API

Get In Touch

Have questions about Devonshire or want to contribute? We'd love to hear from you.

Email: hello@example.com

GitHub: phoenixpulsar/devonshire
